measure.CatchLine: Requires State Forester to establish guidelines for wildfire buffer zones that produce defensible spaces around lands in forestland-urban interface.
measure.MeasureSummary: Requires State Forester to establish guidelines for wildfire buffer zones that produce defensible spaces around lands in forestland-urban interface. Provides tax credit to landowner that establishes wildfire buffer zone.
measure.RelatingToFull: Relating to wildfire buffer zones for lands in forestland-urban interface.
measure.RelatingTo: Relating to wildfire buffer zones for lands in forestland-urban interface.
measure.AtTheRequestOf: (at the request of Senate Interim Committee on Environment and Natural Resources)
measure.FiscalImpact: May have fiscal impact, but no statement yet issued
measure.RevenueImpact: May have revenue impact, but no statement yet issued

sponsors.PresessionFiledMessage: Printed pursuant to Senate Interim Rule 213.28 by order of the President of the Senate in conformance with presession filing rules, indicating neither advocacy nor opposition on the part of the President.

historyActions.ActionText: Introduction and first reading. Referred to President's desk.
Referred to Environment and Natural Resources.
